description.unified: Takes aim and prepares to fire. When reused or when preparation is complete, deals Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line. DMG increases based on cast time up to 150%, and at [3rd stage charge->max charge], knocks enemies down.
For 15sec, Increases ATK by {0} and applies [Perfect Aim] to the target. [Perfect Aim]: DMG dealt by Rodina is increased by 50%.all skills prioritize enemies under [Perfect Aim]
Fires at random enemies, dealing Physical DMG 10 times. Each shot increases DMG by 10% and [(added) ATK Spd by 10%].

IV.unified: Critical Damage of this skill is increased by [50%->80%].
Increases Crit DMG by [50%->60%] for the duration of Skill.
Critical Damage of this skill is increased by [50%->80%].

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage scaling with cast time increases up to 450%.
During the duration, ATK Spd is increased by [250->15%].
Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], and the number of targets is increased by 1.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], and effect increase on attack is increased by [(added) 100%]. [(removed) Ignores enemy Block.]
Stuns damaged enemies for [2 sec->1.2 sec].

description.unified: [Penetration Shot] While casting, increases ATK SPD by [(added) 80%], and on Critical Hit, increases own ATK by {0}% for 10 sec. This ATK increase stacks up to [4 times->2 times]. [(removed) Takes 40% reduced P.DMG and M.DMG for the skill's duration]
[Target Aim] When Rodina's target dies, switches to a random enemy and increases own ATK by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Focused Fire] Increases DMG by {0}%, and the last 2 shots deal DEF-ignoring DMG.
[Consecutive Shot] Changes the number of targets to 2, and reduces the target's P.Crit Resist by {0} for 10 sec.

On hit, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK, knocks the enemy back, and increases ACC by [{0}->{1}] for 10 sec. This ACC increase stacks up to 3 times and can be triggered once every [(added) 4 sec].

Summons the soul of Rodina Custom Rifle Mod.0 for 10sec, increasing own Crit DMG by [100%->70%]. During the duration, every 2sec, deals P.DMG to an enemy and stuns the target for [2 sec->1sec]. If the target is a Boss, the DMG and Stun duration are increased by [2 times->2%].

2.from: Increases DMG by 50% and gains immunity to CC for the duration of Skill.
2.to: Becomes immune to CC for 5 sec.
2.unified: Becomes immune to CC for [(removed) duration of Skill -> 5 sec]. [(removed) Increases DMG by 50%]
